title: Update metalinter dependency
body:
We fixated on old metalinter dependency in past based on experience of
metalinter being oftentimes broke and hence broking our build. See
[762f508d9ca... in cri-o](https://github.com/kubernetes-sigs/cri-o/commit/762f508d9ca97cdbaee6053b663e98aee9cae081) for more details.

Now, dated metalinter is messing up with my environment (like it is
panicing on containters/storage) so let's see if we can move to more
current version of metalinter.

comments.body: Lint has thrown up a good number of new errors. A lot of them seem to be in the generated easyjson code - if we exclude those from lint it should fix a lot of them.
Yeah, I have noticed those locally and then got carried away when searching for how to properly fix the others. Once I figure all that out, I will remove WIP. Thanks.

Looks like this is ready to merge.
/lgtm
